summary: Force UTC on the sync since cursor (created_after/updated_after) so Granola's REST date filter accepts it.
reason: Granola's public REST API rejects a numeric zone offset (…-04:00 -> 400 'Invalid date'); the generated sync emitted local-offset RFC3339. Printed-CLI re-application of the fix tracked upstream in cli-printing-press#3672.
validated_outcome: Live: 'sync' against real Granola synced 764 records / 50 enriched with no 400.
